DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VERONICA J. TILLER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF VICTOR J. STEVENS' COMPLAINT FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, MONEY HAD & RECEIVED, BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY (ACCOUNTING) IN ITS ENTIRETY.
APPEARANCES: Laurel A. Adams, Esq. of Ferns, Adams & Associates 925/927-3401 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Michael E. Freedman, Esq. of Freedman Law Firm 777-1666 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Discussed and the Court sustained the demurrer (without leave to amend) based on pending probate proceeding. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
